jobs.job_title: Site Junior Quality Engineer — Manufacturing & ISO
jobs.description:
Position: On‑Site Junior Quality Engineer — Manufacturing & ISO
A leading technology manufacturer in San Jose, California, is looking for an Entry-Level Quality Engineer to support quality control and assurance processes. The ideal candidate will contribute to implementing quality initiatives throughout production and ensuring compliance with standards. Responsibilities include monitoring production, conducting inspections, leading quality improvement projects, and documenting quality standards.

Move Forward with Volt!

Volt is immediately hiring an entry level Supplier Technical Quality Engineer in San Diego, CA.

As a Supplier Technical Quality Engineer, you will:
• Supporting the resolution of quality issues and processes for the supply function in the organization
• Provides conclusions and recommendations for quality issues and/or continuous quality improvement projects.
• Participates in supplier quality improvement initiatives; works with suppliers to develop and improve quality
